samples.title: Chicken Butter Masala
samples.raw: [BOS]chicken butter masala <INPUT_END> <INSTR_START> In a small bowl, combine the milk, sugar, curry powder, salt, pepper, cayenne, ginger, ginger, thyme, parsley, and coriander. <NEXT_INSTR> Bring to a boil. <NEXT_INSTR> Reduce heat to a simmer and simmer 20 minutes. <NEXT_INSTR> Serve with rice, rice and rice. <INSTR_END> <TITLE_START> Baked Rice <TITLE_END> <RECIPE_END>[EOS]<RECIPE_START> <INPUT_START> ground beef <NEXT_INPUT> tomatoes <NEXT_INPUT

samples.title: Chicken Butter Masala
steps: Saute, onion, garlic, onion in a medium saucepan
Add cumin, oregano, salt and pepper
Beat in flour, parsley, oregano, oregano, and cayenne
